description: Your organization has a strict remote access policy: employees are not expected to connect via SSH during late night hours (Midnight to 5 AM) or on weekends. Using Splunk (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!), create a dashboard named exactly 'Authentication_Temporal_Heatmap' that provides a 2D visualization of authentication events from the security_logs index across days of the week and hours of the day. Additionally, create a scheduled alert named exactly 'Off_Hours_Success_Alert' that triggers on successful logins occurring on weekends or during late night hours (00:00 to 05:00 inclusive). The alert must be scheduled to run hourly (cron: 0 * * * *).
